# readFunctionGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query query hook for readFunctionGraph

## Usage

```typescript
useReadFunctionGraphQuery({ graphId: '<UUID>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useReadFunctionGraphQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useReadFunctionGraphQuery({ graphId: '<UUID>' });
```
